chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 636 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 03-05-2023 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioners; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that after filing instant petition, the petitioners have lost their interest in this matter. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
